description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: If the amounts of any payments included in the Sky Core Executive Vote (see [A.2.

.1.2.1.4 - Settlement Through Sky Core Executive Vote](0d561ea6-8689-459c-85eb-7c861553e116)) are subsequently determined to be incorrect, adjustments are included in the next Monthly Settlement Cycle to ensure that each party pays the amount it owes or receives the amount to which it is entitled.

Core GovOps must prepare a statement specifying the errors, the correct amounts, and the adjustments needed (the "Correction Calculation"). The Correction Calculation must be posted to the Sky Forum under the "Sky Core" category with the `monthly-settlement-cycle` tag. The required contents of the Correction Calculation will be further specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
